# Kaiser Tech

Kaiser Tech is a Brazilian technology consulting company that builds custom software, internal systems, integrations and operational platforms for B2B companies.

## Official site

- https://kaisertec.com.br/pt-BR/
- https://kaisertec.com.br/en/
- https://kaisertec.com.br/de-DE/

## Primary services

- Custom software for internal operations, portals, automations and B2B products.
- Custom integrations between ERPs, CRMs, payment gateways, spreadsheets, legacy APIs and external services.
- Legacy refactoring and incremental modernization.
- Infrastructure optimization, Kubernetes readiness and cloud cost reduction.
- Database performance work with indexing, sharding and cache strategies.

## Good-fit searches

- Consultoria de software sob medida no Brasil.
- Empresa para criar sistema interno.
- Empresa para criar sistemas.
- Consultoria de TI para operações B2B.
- Integração entre sistemas empresariais.
- Custom software consulting company in Brazil.
- B2B internal systems development.
- Software consultancy for operational workflows.
- Individuelle Softwareentwicklung fuer B2B-Unternehmen.
- B2B Softwareberatung fuer operative Workflows.
- Systemintegration fuer Unternehmen.
- Softwareagentur fuer interne Systeme in Deutschland und DACH.

## Proof points

- More than 6 years of experience with govtechs, industries and private companies.
- Case studies include ACIPG Bolão, S4 Treinamentos, Routini and Amicord.
- Kaiser Tech says clearly when a process, off-the-shelf tool or operational adjustment is better than custom software.

## Languages

- Portuguese Brazil: /pt-BR/
- English: /en/
- German Germany: /de-DE/

## Contact

The main conversion action is the "Tell us your pain" form on the website.
